{'about': {'aboutContent': '
\xa0






Welcome to the Commerce City Capital Improvement Program Interactive Web Map\xa0

The\nCity of Commerce City Capital Improvement Program (CIP) includes capital\nimprovements that are new construction, replacement, and/or renovation of City\nfacilities or infrastructure.


\n\n

The\nCIP also includes services that indirectly lead to the construction of capital\nimprovements, such as feasibility studies, master planning, and real estate\ntransactions.

Welcome to the Commerce City Oil and Gas Permit Information Map.

\xa0\xa0

This map provides an overview of Oil and Gas activity occurring within the City of Commerce City’s jurisdictional boundaries. The map is reflective of city level permit activity only.\xa0To access state permit information, please visit the\xa0Colorado Oil and Gas Conservation Commission (COGCC) mapping system.\xa0Planned facilities where a state permit has been submitted for review, but an application has not been filed with the City of Commerce City, are not reflected in this map.

\xa0\xa0

If there are any functional issues with this map, please contact GIS@c3gov.com

This product was produced by the Commerce City GIS Division and Department of Community Development. The City of Commerce City has made every effort to produce data as accurately as possible. Maps are general representations and are produced for general representation only. Maps may contain information that is no longer current. Use of this information is the sole responsibility of the user and the City of Commerce City shall assume no liability for any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in information provided regardless of cause and assumes no liability for any decisions made or actions taken or not taken in reliance upon this map or any information provided. Sale or reproduction of this product is prohibited without the express written consent of the City of Commerce City.

This map provides an overview of Oil and Gas activity occurring within Commerce City’s jurisdictional boundaries.\xa0This map reflects city level permit activity only.


To access state permit information, including the location of any Form 2, Form 2a or Spacing applications, please visit the Colorado Oil and Gas Conservation Commission (COGCC) mapping system here.


Planned facilities where a state permit has been submitted for review, but an application has not been filed with the City of Commerce City, are not reflected in this map.


Selecting an individual permit application on the map shows the following information:


Name

Name of the proposed well pad

City Permit Number

The unique processing identifier assigned to each permit application

City Permit Status

The current status of the city’s review of the permit

Operator

The operator (applicant) applying for the permit

Number of Wells

The number of proposed wells on the site

Township, Range, Section

Location of the facility, using the description assigned through the Public Land Survey System (PLSS)

Associated Council Action

Oil and Gas permits may have associated land use cases that go before City Council for approval before staff can administratively approve an Oil and Gas Permit. This field lists the type of action required (either a re-zoning or a Conditional Use Permit)

Date of Permit Submittal

The date the permit submittal was provided to the city

Date Deemed Complete

The date the city deemed the permit submittal complete and began reviewing the application

Link to Permit

Link to the Oil and Gas permit submittal. This includes the overall summary narrative and location drawings. To see a copy of the full permit (large file), please submit a public records request here.

Sign Up For Notifications

Visit www.c3gov.com/subscribe to sign up for the Oil and Gas news feed.


Each permit application on the map is color coded by its status:




Other Useful Maps

COGCC (Colorado Oil and Gas Conservation Commission) Web Map

Colorado Division of Water Resources (DWR) Web Map

National Pipeline Mapping System
